name: Alley
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
Discard a card.
-----
You can play this from your deck as if in your hand.

name: Amass
instructions: If you have no Action cards in play, gain an Action card costing up to $5.

name: Approaching Army
instructions:
After you play an Attack card, +$1.
-----
Setup: Add an Attack kingdom card pile to the Supply.

name: Aristocrat
Artist
instructions:
+1 Action
+1 Card per card you have exactly one copy of in play.

name: Asceticism
instructions: Pay any amount of $ to trash that many cards from your hand.

name: Biding Time
instructions: At the start of your Clean-up, set aside your hand face down. At the start of your next turn, put those cards into your hand.

name: Bureaucracy
instructions: When you gain a card that doesn't cost $0, gain a Copper.

name: Change
instructions: If you have any D, +$3. Otherwise, trash a card from your hand, and gain a card costing more $ than it. +D equal to the difference in $.

name: Continue
instructions: Once per turn: Gain a non-Attack Action card costing up to $4. Return to your Action phase and play it. +1 Action and +1 Buy.

name: Craftsman
instructions:
+2D
Gain a card costing up to $5.

name: Credit
instructions: Gain an Action or Treasure costing up to $8. +D equal to its cost.

name: Daimyo
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
The next time you play a non-Command Action card this turn, replay it afterwards.

name: Divine Wind
instructions: When you remove the last Sun, remove all Kingdom card piles from the Supply, and set up 10 new random piles.

name: Enlightenment
instructions: Treasures are also Actions. When you play a Treasure in an Action phase, instead of following its instructions, +1 Card and +1 Action.

name: Fishmonger
instructions:
+1 Buy
+$1
-----
You can play this from your deck as if in your hand.

name: Flourishing Trade
instructions: Cards cost $1 less. You may use Action plays as Buys.

name: Foresight
instructions: Reveal cards from your deck until revealing an Action. Set it aside and discard the rest. Put it into your hand at end of turn.

name: Gather
instructions: Gain a card costing exactly $3, a card costing exactly $4, and a card costing exactly $5.

name: Gold Mine
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
+1 Buy
You may gain a Gold and get +4D.

name: Good Harvest
instructions: The first time you play each differently named Treasure each turn, first, +1 Buy and +$1.

name: Great Leader
instructions: After each Action card you play, +1 Action.

name: Growth
instructions: When you gain a Treasure, gain a cheaper card.

name: Harsh Winter
instructions: When you gain a card on your turn, if there's D on its pile, take it; otherwise put 2D on its pile.

name: Imperial Envoy
instructions:
+5 Cards
+1 Buy
+2D

name: Kind Emperor
instructions: At the start of your turn, and when you remove the last Sun: Gain an Action to your hand.

name: Kintsugi
instructions: Trash a card from your hand. If you've gained a Gold this game, gain a card costing up to $2 more than the trashed card.

name: Kitsune
instructions:
+1Sun
Choose two different options: +2 Actions; +$2; each other player gains a Curse; gain a Silver.

name: Litter
instructions:
+2 Cards
+2 Actions
+1D

name: Mountain Shrine
instructions:
+1Sun
+$2
You may trash a card from your hand. Then if there are any Action cards in the trash, +2 Cards.

name: Ninja
instructions:
+1 Card
Each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand.
-----
You can play this from your deck as if in your hand.

name: Panic
instructions: When you play a Treasure, +2 Buys, and when you discard one from play, return it to its pile.

name: Poet
instructions:
+1Sun
+1 Card
+1 Action
Reveal the top card of your deck. If it costs $3 or less, put it into your hand.

name: Practice
instructions: You may play an Action card from your hand twice.

name: Progress
instructions: When you gain a card, put it onto your deck.

name: Rapid Expansion
instructions: When you gain an Action or Treasure, set it aside, and play it at the start of your next turn.

name: Receive Tribute
instructions: If you've gained at least 3 cards this turn, gain up to 3 differently named Action cards you don't have copies of in play.

name: Rice
instructions:
+1 Buy
+$1 per different type among cards you have in play.

name: Rice Broker
instructions:
+1 Action
Trash a card from your hand. If it's a Treasure, +2 Cards. If it's an Action, +5 Cards.

name: River Shrine
instructions:
+1Sun
Trash up to 2 cards from your hand. At the start of Clean-up, if you didn't gain any cards in your Buy phase this turn, gain a card costing up to $4.

name: Riverboat
instructions:
At the start of your next turn, play the set aside card, leaving it there.
-----
Setup: Set aside an unused non-Duration Action card costing $5.

name: Ronin
instructions:
Draw until you have 7 cards in hand.
-----
You can play this from your deck as if in your hand.

name: Root Cellar
instructions:
+3 Cards
+1 Action
+3D

name: Rustic Village
instructions:
+1Sun
+1 Card
+2 Actions
You may discard 2 cards for +1 Card.

name: Samurai
instructions:
Each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand (once).
At the start of each of your turns this game, +$1.
(This stays in play.)

name: Sea Trade
instructions: +1 Card per Action card you have in play. Trash up to that many cards from your hand.

name: Sickness
instructions: At the start of your turn, choose one: Gain a Curse onto your deck; or discard 3 cards.

name: Snake Witch
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
If your hand has no duplicate cards, you may reveal it and return this to its pile, to have each other player gain a Curse.

name: Tanuki
instructions:
Trash a card from your hand. Gain a card costing up to $2 more than it.
-----
You can play this from your deck as if in your hand.

name: Tea House
instructions:
+1Sun
+1 Card
+1 Action
+$2
